item.title: Photo ID Age Verification required for GTA6
item.description: Source: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/dCFgXLMmkoc Related: https://in.ign.com/grand-theft-auto-online/238083/news/gta-online-rockstar-games-reportedly-set-to-add-age-verification-system-to-access-the-game-or-its-ce https://rockstarintel.com/rockstar-games-plans-age-verification-for-gta-online/ It's already started - https://www.reddit.com/r/gtaonline/comments/1mgwktt/rockstar_has_begun_rolling_out_age_verification/ As the video says "Parents are supposed to protect their children from Mature content." Not corporations, or governments.

item.title: I Love our President
item.description: He may look like Danny DeVito cosplaying Bernie Sanders (or a hobbit if you are being an asshole), but he has always been on the right side of things and has never been afraid to speak his mind. Wish we could have him for longer.
item.dc:creator: gobnaitOLunacy

item.title: One in four occupants of my country dictated to watch it all burn.
item.description: It gets bleaker and bleaker. He’s eviscerating environmental protections. He accuses Obama of treason. He’s ripping up labor protections. He wants to privatize Social Security. He fires the head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics because he doesn’t like the job numbers. He forces the Smithsonian to take down an exhibit that includes his two impeachments. The European Union, Japan, Columbia University, and CBS are all surrendering to him. ~ Robert Reich https://rbreich.com/
item.dc:creator: Shawnofavitch

item.title: Gotta water them so they'll grow
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: And in case you're wondering how long the Cons have been waging war on education..
item.description: ..this is LeVar and the six month old daughter he mentioned now, and by now, I mean like four years ago, I just really liked this picture of them together.

I fucking love cheese…and the right to choose!
I REALLY FUCKING LOVE CHEESE!
I absolutely adore cold weather
Cheese makes EVERYTHING better
This is tasting cheese!
Stay fresh, cheesebags!

item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: The entire concept of "the deal" is antithetical to transparency, fair play, and the rule of law.
item.description: This “mob shakedown” mentality of making “deals” would be a big story for a corporate press interested in democracy and the 1st Amendment. However, entities like the NYT and Washington Post have shown time and time again they have no interest in either, only in maintaining access to chaos in order to make large sums of money.
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Tag
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Sleepy window kitty Sorry for the very late post. Life has been using my ass as a hacky-sack. Hopefully I can get back to an early posting schedule soon
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: Congratulations to this queen!
item.description: Today is the annual Dolly Parton Day in Nashville and Guinness named her an official icon! Additionally, Dollywood has been named the No. 1 amusement park in the U.S. by Tripadvisor and ranked 11th globally. Southern Barbecue Sauce: https://www.msn.com/en-us/music/news/dolly-parton-and-dollywood-soar-to-new-heights-with-new-awards/ar-AA1JWG3r?ocid=BingNewsSerp
item.dc:creator: DonkeyGoat

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1433 (everything is canon)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This is how life is going, too.
This actually sounds like a fun challenge
I believe these are Gastonia.
Also Pippin.
I fucking thought this was a Quetzalcoatlus at first.
Hummingbirds are a new world family of birds. Although the oldest fossils of them are found in the old world.
An image so cursed i had to post it in two dumps.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "okay. Pippin. Pippin? Oh Pippin. Pippin! Okay. Thank you. Okay pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Food Memes Vol 1
item.description: I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: Time to shop
item.description:
Down almost 60 pounds and time to refresh my wardrobe in time for fall!
I adore fall and can’t wait to buy stuff in size medium instead of XXL. dieting, exercise, and cutting out alcohol did wonders for me. Looking to drop another 15-20 or so before the wedding in April 2026; plenty of time!
item.dc:creator: lifesucksgetahelmet

item.title: Everybody gets a subpoena
item.description:
That is of course except the Tangerine tyrant
Anybody on the list needs to be in jail. https://www.thedailybeast.com/republicans-subpoena-everyone-and-anyone-over-epsteinexcept-trump/ Fp edit: my landlord's hired somebody with a swastika on their arm. I'm really tired of this area already. Anybody recommend anywhere in Northern minnesota? I hear Duluth is interesting.
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: nevermore
item.dc:creator: fallibledegenerate

item.title: A Working Man - My First Movie Review
item.description: I watched A Working Man so you don’t have to - Come along for the ride, as we try to figure out why Statham became a Meth dealer for 20 minutes in this movie for no reason… I had such a blast making this! And I am really hoping to do more of these if my audience likes this kind of thing... https://youtu.be/aLYpg_4TVJ8 Just to get ahead of it - if you aren't into my posts about my new YouTube channel... It is 1000% okay to just ignore me here, you don't have to comment something sh*tty or ponder why I exist or who I am. I know that is a shocking revelation - but you actually don't have to be mean to me - this is why I tag my stuff appropriately if you don't want to see it.
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: I wonder if firefighters know this trick.
item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #186
item.description: ? Trump is frantic. That's why he is steering the national conversation toward culture wars to bury the Epstein files while Democratic legislators from Texas, backed by state leaders in California, Illinois, and New York, are risking fines, arrests, and political exile to stop GOP power grabs over redistricting. He’s counting on spectacle, but the real fight for fair representation is happening now: Texas Democrats halting gerrymandering in motion, and blue states gearing up to retaliate to preserve democratic checks. We’re not spectators. We have to step in and amplify this resistance. Don’t rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what’s going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist GovBrief Today - What Happened #186 Links 1. https://go.govbrief.today/all-or-nothing-gaza 2. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-denial-israel-boycott 3. https://go.govbrief.today/va-hospitals-abortion-ban 4. https://go.govbrief.today/gop-senators-hold-nominations 5. https://go.govbrief.today/duffy-announce-moon-reactor 6. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-aide-wh-liaison 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-targets-debanking-conservatives 8. https://go.govbrief.today/greene-trump-santos-clemency 9. https://go.govbrief.today/us-exiling-people-rwanda 10. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-wants-camp-agreements 11. https://go.govbrief.today/reimbursable-visa-deposit 12. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-house-democrats-warrants 13. https://go.govbrief.today/voa-director-fired 14. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-shedd-leaves-labor 15. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-rips-jaguar-praises-sweeney 16. https://go.govbrief.today/feds-reinstalling-confederate-statue 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-sons-startup-shares Yesterday's Most Read - https://go.govbrief.today/tx-democrats-block-gerrymandering Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/barkley-denies-council-involvement Please Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
